# Current User (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry Current User.

```terraform
data "foundry_current_user" "example" {
  # This data source does not require any arguments, as it retrieves information about the currently authenticated user.
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) The email at which to contact a User. Multiple users may have the same email address.
- `family_name` (String) The family name (last name) of the User.
- `given_name` (String) The given name of the User.
- `id` (String) ID of the User.
- `organization` (String) The RID of the user's primary Organization.
- `realm` (String) Realm of the User.
- `username` (String) The Foundry username of the User. This is unique within the realm.
